llama_few_shot_summary: The reviewer is not a fan of flavored coffees and finds them artificial and weird. They liked the Amazonia and Africana medium roasts, but not the Colombian. The dark roast Eclipse, Mexican, and French roast were very good. They made the coffee into ice coffee, which was strong but not bitter. They didn't care for the Costa Rican light roast, which had an artificial taste. The House Blend was good but nothing special. They used the decaf to water their plants, which perked up. The chocolate raspberry flavor went well into a chocolate cake batter. If priced right, they would buy again. Some customers were disappointed with the selection, finding duplicates of ordinary coffees and missing flavors. Others were pleased with the variety and timely delivery. One customer was disappointed with the missing flavors they were promised. Overall, the coffee is considered better than average, but the selection and missing flavors were a letdown for some.

Customers from Greece confirm that this is an original Cretan olive oil. They praise its pure and full taste, making it ideal for cooking, salads, and dressings. The reviewer's wife enjoys using it in her cooking, resulting in tasty and full-flavored foods. The reviewer recommends it to anyone looking to improve their nutritional habits. Other customers use it for various purposes, such as salads, dipping bread, hummus, and sautéing veggies and meat. They appreciate its high quality and delicious taste. Some customers have gotten their family members hooked on it. The reviewer also praises the company's production process, which involves going to farmers markets and letting people sample the oil. They believe that paying a little extra for this olive oil is worth it due to its quality and longevity. One reviewer, who is biased but confident, claims that this olive oil has the best flavor and low acidity among all the olive oils they have tasted.

Summary: One reviewer highly recommends Trident Vitality gum, praising its strong peppermint flavor, long-lasting quality, and good value. They tried all three flavors and couldn't choose a favorite. The gum has a physical profile similar to old-school Chicklet gum. Another reviewer is disappointed with the product, citing the lack of ingredient information, no explanation of the gum's benefits, and the presence of soy. The packaging is neat, but the taste is unremarkable. The reviewer feels that the product is incomplete and doesn't provide enough information.

Summary: Some customers are extremely satisfied with this edible glitter, praising its sparkle and recommending it for decorating cakes. They also appreciate the fast delivery. However, one customer was disappointed with the product, stating it tastes like craft glitter and is not edible. They advise sticking with Wilton products for trust-worthy edible glitter. Another customer used the glitter for a disco ball birthday cake and received positive feedback from their customer. They recommend the product for adding a special touch to treats.

Customers use these licorice products for office snacks, and they appreciate the bite-sized pieces. One customer reported a bag breaking open during shipping. Some customers prefer Twizzlers brand over another well-known brand. The black and cherry flavors are well-received, but the strawberry flavor is considered too delicate. Some customers are addicted to the product and appreciate the value of buying in bulk. The product is also recommended for children due to its soft and easy-to-chew texture, making it a less messy option. One customer suspects that the pieces in the bag may have been reduced in size to make it appear like a better deal. However, this change affects the flavor experience.
